argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const op = 'CreateList'; const fallback = 'UQRa0jJ9doxGEIQRea1Y0w'; let scripts = performance.getEntriesByType('resource').filter(r => r.name.includes('client-web') && r.name.endsWith('.js')).map(r => r.name); if (scripts.length < 5) { for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); scripts = performance.getEntriesByType('resource').filter(r => r.name.includes('client-web') && r.name.endsWith('.js')).map(r => r.name); if (scripts.length >= 5) break; } } let queryId = fallback; for (const scriptUrl of scripts.slice(0, 30)) { try { const text = await (await fetch(scriptUrl)).text(); const re = new RegExp('queryId:"([A-Za-z0-9_-]+)"[^}]{0,200}operationName:"' + op + '"'); const match = text.match(re); if (match) { queryId = match[1]; break; } } catch {} } return { queryId }; }

async (intermediate) => { const queryId = intermediate.queryId; const name = '{{ name }}'; const description = '{{ description }}' || ''; const isPrivate = {{ is_private }} || false; const ct0 = document.cookie.split(';').map(c=>c.trim()).find(c=>c.startsWith('ct0='))?.split('=')[1]; if (!ct0) return { error: 'Not logged into x.com (no ct0 cookie)' }; const bearer = 'AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAANRILgAAAAAAnNwIzUejRCOuH5E6I8xnZz4puTs%3D1Zv7ttfk8LF81IUq16cHjhLTvJu4FA33AGWWjCpTnA'; const headers = { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + decodeURIComponent(bearer), 'X-Csrf-Token': ct0, 'X-Twitter-Auth-Type': 'OAuth2Session', 'X-Twitter-Active-User': 'yes', 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }; const body = JSON.stringify({ variables: { isPrivate, name, description }, features: { profile_label_improvements_pcf_label_in_post_enabled: true, responsive_web_profile_redirect_enabled: false, rweb_tipjar_consumption_enabled: false, verified_phone_label_enabled: false, responsive_web_graphql_skip_user_profile_image_extensions_enabled: false, responsive_web_graphql_timeline_navigation_enabled: true } }); const resp = await fetch('/i/api/graphql/' + queryId + '/CreateList', { method: 'POST', headers, body, credentials: 'include' }); const data = await resp.json(); const listResult = data?.data?.list?.result || data?.data?.list; const listId = listResult?.id_str || listResult?.rest_id || listResult?.id; if (!listId) return { error: 'CreateList response missing list id', status: resp.status, data }; return { listId: String(listId), name: listResult?.name || name, isPrivate: listResult?.mode === 'Private' || isPrivate, members: listResult?.member_count || 0, subscribers: listResult?.subscriber_count || 0 }; }

async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.error) return [{ listId: '', name: '', status: 'error', message: intermediate.error }]; return [{ listId: intermediate.listId, name: intermediate.name, isPrivate: intermediate.isPrivate, members: intermediate.members, subscribers: intermediate.subscribers, status: 'success', message: 'Created list ' + intermediate.listId + ' (' + intermediate.name + ')' }]; }
